title: Permanent grassland assessment form: Countryside Stewardship
body: "Use this form as evidence that your land meets certain eligibility requirements for the following options.   GS2, GS5, GS6 and OT2 under Countryside Stewardship Mid Tier GS2 and GS5 under the Wildlife Offers.   Keep this form as we may ask to see it. You do not need to send this form with your application. If you prefer, use your own format to record this information.  More information on these options:   (GS2) Permanent grassland with very low inputs (outside SDAs) (GS5) Assessment of eligibility for permanent grassland options (GS6) Management of species-rich grassland (OT2) Organic land management - unimproved permanent grassland   "
